title: Voorne Vanilla Plus
description: A modpack focusing on adding more quality of life mods and adding new mechanics.
body:
Voorne Vanilla Plus is a lightweight yet feature-rich Fabric modpack designed to take vanilla Minecraft to the next level.

![Noice](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd466bb33683dee8f9984578d693deec71f9159e.png)

This pack focuses on improved performance while expanding gameplay in a way that stays true to the original feel of Minecraft. Explore a fresh world with stunning new terrain thanks to Oh The Biomes We’ve Gone (BWG), discover reworked and immersive structures through Dungeons and Taverns, and enjoy a richer farming experience with Farmer’s Delight.

To keep the world engaging and challenging, mobs are smarter and more dynamic with Mob AI Tweaks, making survival more exciting than ever. And that’s just the start Voorne Vanilla Plus adds countless enhancements, optimizations, and quality-of-life improvements to create a smooth yet deeply refreshing Minecraft adventure.

Whether you’re here for exploration, survival, or just a better-performing game, this pack is built to give you vanilla plus more.
